notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for india. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: India Tourist Visa for Chinese Nationals

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for India
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to India, VIZA AI should consider the Indian Visa Online and Indian mission or visa application centre route, with regular tourist visa as the conservative route for Chinese tourists. First confirm nationality, legal residence, purpose, stay length, destination cities, and whether the applicant is eligible for eVisa under current rules. Do not assume Chinese ordinary passport holders can use e-Tourist Visa unless current official eligibility is confirmed. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: India regular visa application process direction
chunks.content: Indian visa application guidance uses the Indian Visa Online portal for completing the visa application form. For regular/paper tourist visa cases, applicants typically fill the online form, print/sign it, book or follow the relevant mission/visa application centre process, and submit passport, photo and supporting documents. VIZA AI should ask where the applicant legally resides because the Indian mission or visa application centre jurisdiction affects the checklist.

chunks.title: India eVisa caution for Chinese passport holders
chunks.content: Because India eVisa eligibility for Chinese nationals has changed over time and may differ by visa category, VIZA AI should not promise eVisa availability for Chinese ordinary passport holders unless current official eligibility is confirmed. For Chinese tourists, explain the safer route as regular tourist visa through Indian official channels and ask the user to verify on the official Indian Visa Online / Embassy pages immediately before applying.

documents.title: India Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: India application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Indian Visa Online / regular visa application route Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/visa/index.html. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: India fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, religion/visible identification marks where requested, address/contact, family details, profession, travel itinerary, Indian references, previous India travel/visa history and security questions

chunks.title: India supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: printed/signed online form when required, passport, photo, appointment/receipt, itinerary, hotel/invitation, funds/employment evidence and jurisdiction-specific checklist items Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for india.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Passport and identity fields:
- Crawler reached official or authorized source URLs, but did not extract a concise field-specific sentence. Keep this country's field answers constrained to official forms, passport data, and source URLs already listed in the country RAG seed.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
